summary: Phase 5 comprehensive testing completed for ETI Educom website. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). All new Phase 5 frontend features verified working. Major features tested: Admin login protection, Summer Training landing page with 14 programs, Quick Enquiry form in homepage hero, Admin tabs for Summer and Quick leads, updated social media links in footer.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login with correct password returns success=true and 32-char token
Backend: Admin login with wrong password returns success=false
Backend: Admin token verification works for valid tokens
Backend: Admin token verification rejects invalid tokens
Backend: POST /api/summer-training-leads creates lead (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/summer-training-leads returns list (200 OK)
Backend: DELETE /api/summer-training-leads/:id deletes lead (200 OK)
Backend: Summer training lead validation (422 for invalid data)
Backend: POST /api/quick-enquiry creates enquiry (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/quick-enquiry returns list (200 OK)
Backend: DELETE /api/quick-enquiry/:id deletes enquiry (200 OK)
Backend: Quick enquiry with optional email field (200 OK)
Backend: Quick enquiry validation (422 for invalid data)
Backend: Health check endpoint (200 OK)
Backend: Root endpoint (200 OK)
Backend: Events endpoint (200 OK)
Backend: Reviews endpoint (200 OK)
Backend: Programs endpoint (200 OK)
Frontend: Homepage displays Quick Enquiry form in hero section
Frontend: Quick Enquiry form has Name, Phone, Interest dropdown fields
Frontend: Quick Enquiry form submits to /api/quick-enquiry endpoint
Frontend: Summer Training page at /summer-training is standalone (no header)
Frontend: Summer Training form has Name, Email, Phone, Program, Duration fields
Frontend: Summer Training program dropdown has 14 programs

Frontend: Programs include Python, Web Dev, Digital Marketing, SEO, Ethical Hacking, Networking, AutoCAD, Graphic Design, Data Science, Cloud Computing, MS Office, App Development, AI/ML, Cybersecurity
Frontend: Admin page shows login screen when not logged in
Frontend: Admin login with password 'etieducom@admin2025' grants access
Frontend: Admin dashboard shows Summer tab with leads count
Frontend: Admin dashboard shows Quick tab with enquiries count
Frontend: Admin Summer tab displays Summer Training Leads section
Frontend: Admin Quick tab displays Quick Enquiries (Homepage) section
Frontend: Footer has Facebook link (https://www.facebook.com/etieducom)
Frontend: Footer has Instagram link (https://www.instagram.com/etieducom/)
Frontend: Footer has LinkedIn link (https://www.linkedin.com/company/etieducom)
Frontend: Footer has YouTube link (https://www.youtube.com/@ETIEducomofficial)
Frontend: All social links open in new tab (target=_blank, rel=noopener noreferrer)
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is excellent - proper use of Pydantic models, async/await patterns, data-testid attributes
Admin login uses simple password-based auth with SHA256 hash token - appropriate for simple admin protection
Summer Training page correctly implemented as standalone landing page without header/footer
All 14 trending programs correctly displayed in Summer Training dropdown
Social media links properly configured with target=_blank and rel=noopener noreferrer for security
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed summer training lead and quick enquiry during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 features fully tested. New APIs (admin/login, admin/verify, summer-training-leads, quick-enquiry) all working with CRUD operations. New pages (Summer Training) and features (Quick Enquiry form, Admin login, Admin tabs for Summer/Quick) all rendering correctly. Social media links updated in footer. Admin password is etieducom@admin2025.

new_apis: POST /api/admin/login - Admin login with password validation
new_pages: Summer Training at /summer-training - Standalone landing page with 14 programs and registration form
updated_pages: Homepage - Quick Enquiry form in hero section (replaces image)
Admin page - Login protection + Summer and Quick tabs for leads management
footer_changes: Social media links updated: Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube with correct URLs
